mapper.sql: select um.user_miner_id, um.user_id, um.miner_id, um.is_current, um.claim_time, um.active_time, um.inactive_time, um.total_output_wag, um.status, um.create_time, um.update_time, m.miner_name, m.miner_level, m.power, m.wag_per_day, m.cover_image from sys_user_miner um left join sys_miner m on m.miner_id = um.miner_id
mapper.select: where um.user_id = #{userId} and um.is_current = '1' and um.status = '0' order by um.user_miner_id desc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into sys_user_miner(user_id, miner_id, is_current, claim_time, active_time, inactive_time, total_output_wag, status, create_time, update_time) values(#{userId}, #{minerId}, #{isCurrent}, #{claimTime}, #{activeTime}, #{inactiveTime}, #{totalOutputWag}, #{status}, now(), now()) on duplicate key update user_miner_id = last_insert_id(user_miner_id), update_time = now()
mapper.update: update sys_user_miner set is_current = case when user_miner_id = #{currentUserMinerId} then '1' else '0' end, active_time = case when user_miner_id = #{currentUserMinerId} then #{now} else active_time end, inactive_time = case when user_miner_id = #{currentUserMinerId} then inactive_time else (case when is_current = '1' then #{now} else inactive_time end) end, update_time = now() where user_id = #{userId} and status = '0'
